item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 171130Z AUTO 19008KT 150V230 9999 FEW024/// SCT058/// BKN080/// ///TCU 17/13 Q1013 TEMPO 2500 -TSRA SCT020CB
